disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images.
disable_safety_checker.title: Disable Safety Checker

enhance_details.description: Enhance fine textures and small details. May increase contrast and introduce minor deviations from the original image.
enhance_details.title: Enhance Details

enhance_realism.description: Improve realism. May deviate more from the original image. Recommended for AI-generated images.
enhance_realism.title: Enhance Realism

factor.description: Scaling factor applied to each side of the image (used when upscale_mode is 'factor'). Output capped at 8 MP.
factor.title: Factor

no_op.description: Health check mode - returns status without inference.
no_op.title: No Op

output_quality.description: Quality when saving the output images, from 0 to 100. 100 is best quality, 0 is lowest quality. Not relevant for .png outputs
output_quality.title: Output Quality

target.description: Target resolution in megapixels (used when upscale_mode is 'target').
target.title: Target

upscale_mode.description: Upscale mode. 'target' scales to a fixed megapixel resolution. 'factor' multiplies each side by the given factor.
upscale_mode.title: upscale_mode
